S

scale(Vec2i, int) - Static method in class jGameLib.math.Vec2i
Scales a vector by a constant c.
scale(Vec2i, int, int) - Static method in class jGameLib.math.Vec2i
Scales each component of a vector by sx and sy, respectively.
scale(Vec2, double) - Static method in class jGameLib.math.Vec2
Scales a vector by a constant c.
scale(Vec2, double, double) - Static method in class jGameLib.math.Vec2
Scales each component of a vector by sx and sy, respectively.
